description: Phase 2: build a backtested market intelligence layer that explains odds, computes edge, and enforces bet/no-bet gating.

userStories.title: Define market schema and required fields
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a stable market schema so edge calculations are consistent and reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: Define market schema with required fields: opening odds, current odds, implied probabilities, edge, alignment, bet decision
Schema documented with field types and allowed nulls

userStories.title: Odds ingestion + history snapshots
userStories.description: As the system, I need odds snapshots so market movement and edge can be evaluated over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Odds snapshots captured for >= 90% fixtures in season
Opening + closing odds stored when available
Time-travel checks ensure odds captured pre-kickoff

userStories.title: Implied probability calculator
userStories.description: As the system, I need implied probabilities from odds to compare market vs model.
acceptanceCriteria: Missing odds handled with explicit nulls

userStories.title: Internal probability model
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a model probability estimate to compute edge vs market.

userStories.title: Edge + alignment computation
userStories.description: As the system, I need to compute edge and alignment to drive bet/no-bet decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Edge computed per outcome (model prob - market prob)

userStories.title: Bet/no-bet gate
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a strict gate so we only recommend bets with real edge.
acceptanceCriteria: Gate uses edge threshold + confidence band
No-bet is default when data missing

userStories.title: Backtest evaluation job
userStories.description: As the founder, I need backtests that show whether edge and gating are profitable.
acceptanceCriteria: ROI proxy computed per prompt and per confidence bucket

userStories.title: Market validation dashboard
userStories.description: As the founder, I need market validation views to judge edge quality and risk.

userStories.title: Baseline market benchmarks
userStories.description: As the founder, I need market baselines to compare against naive strategies.

userStories.title: Time-travel safety checks for market data
userStories.description: As the system, I must guarantee market evaluation never uses post-kickoff odds.
